stub: She is a Labour MP who comes from a ethnic minority middle class background.
constituency: She is from a constituency that is not your constituency.
personalization: She tends to vote in accordance with the instructions of her party, even when that conflicts with her own beliefs.
substantive: She opposes the construction of thousands of new onshore wind turbines.
justification: In political debates, she regularly explains how her decisions help to promote the interests of people like you (e.g. of your class and educational background).
responsiveness: Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “If I lose an election doing what I think is right, then so be it.”
text: She is a Labour MP who comes from a ethnic minority middle class background. She is from a constituency that is not your constituency. She tends to vote in accordance with the instructions of her party, even when that conflicts with her own beliefs. She opposes the construction of thousands of new onshore wind turbines. In political debates, she regularly explains how her decisions help to promote the interests of people like you (e.g. of your class and educational background). Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “If I lose an election doing what I think is right, then so be it.”
